title: AI Codebase Assistant
description: Built an AI-powered assistant indexing 70+ GitHub repositories and 8 Slack channels to enable semantic search across engineering knowledge sources. Designed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline using OpenAI APIs and ChromaDB, with PR-triggered ingestion workflows to keep data up to date.

title: SpeedMaster
description: Developed a real-time solo and multiplayer typing game with dynamic scoring and smooth navigation. Built using MERN stack with efficient state management and responsive UI for seamless gameplay experience.

title: YouTube Bookmarker Extension
description: Built a Chrome extension to bookmark and organize important timestamps in YouTube videos, enabling quick navigation and improved content consumption through tagging and retrieval features.

title: CellScout
description: Developed a web scraping tool using BeautifulSoup to extract and filter mobile phone data based on price and specifications, enabling efficient comparison and decision-making.
